product.name: Weatherproofing Silicone Sealant
product.description: Alumasc Low Modulus 310cc Dow Corning 791 Silicone Mastic Sealant is used as a protective weatherproof seal for all Alumasc Rainwater Systems.  Apply sufficient sealant between the gutter and the socket union clip so that some squeezes out of the joint when tightened. A minimum 3mm thickness should be applied right across the joint and around the holes.    Delivery time for this product is3-5 working days

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Cast Aluminium Beaded Deep Run External Stopend 113x75mm HR4/250
product.description: The Alumasc 113mm Heritage Cast Aluminium Beaded Deep Run External Stopend provides an essential solution for capping the ends of a 113mm Heritage beaded deep run rainwater system. The component is designed under kitemark BS 8530 for low maintenance and ease of installation. All fittings are available in a milled (plain) and Polyester Powder Coated (PPC) finish.  The product in the image is Polyester Powder Coated (PPC) in Textured Black.  Get in touch today on 01354 700853 for expert advice and specifications, or download the Alumasc Heritage Guttering Datasheet and Installation Guide below. product.name: Cast Aluminium Beaded Deep Run Combined 90 Deg Angle 113x75mm HR4/247
product.description: Manufactured by Alumasc, the Heritage Cast Aluminium Beaded Deep Run Combined 90 Degree Angle is designed with two sockets measuring 113mm and 75mm. product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

The system is easy to fit with sealed fixing points on all outlets and unions. Use with the Brett Martin 68mm Round Downpipe.  With a high gloss finish, the range is available in Black, White, Grey, Brown and Anthracite.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Snow Guard
product.description: With the UK weather conditions becoming increasingly unpredictable, installing Floplast's Snow / Tile Guard ensures your property is protected, as well as preventing unnecessary injury from falling tiles, snow and debris.    Easy to handle and straightforward to install.   Prevents snow/tile slippage.   2m wide x 162mm high.   Brackets should be fitted at a maximum of 800mm centres, using two No.2 12 x 1" round head screws.  Galvanised - for long lasting performance.   Protects conservatories from falling roof tiles.   Assists in reducing insurance costs/claims caused by snow/tile damage.

product.name: Square Line 90dg Gutter Angle
product.description: The FloPlast Square Line 90 degree Gutter Angle is used to direct the gutter around a corner. Because of the symmetrical profile of the square gutter, the 90 degree angle can be used for both internal and external corners. The FloPlast Square Line system is suitable for both new build and refurbishment applications.  Available in Black, White, Brown and Anthracite.

product.name: Gutter Brush 100mm 4m
product.description: The FloPlast Gutter Brush Keeps Gutters Clear All Year Round.    No more sticks - No more leaves - No more twigs - No more birds or rodents - No more blocked gutters.    The FloPlast Gutter Brushes are in 4m Lengths and are Manufactured Using a Stainless Steel Core and Polypropylene to Create the Brush   10 Year Guarantee   Prevents Bird Nuisance   Fits Round, Square and Moulded Gutters   Can be Cleaned Easily if Necessary   Fitted in Minutes - Lasts for Years   Means No More Overflowing Gutters   Avoids Climbing Ladders for Maintenance   Also Fits Cast Iron, Steel and Asbestos Gutters

product.name: Snow Guard
product.description: With the UK weather conditions becoming increasingly unpredictable, installing Floplast's Snow / Tile Guard ensures your property is protected, as well as preventing unnecessary injury from falling tiles, snow and debris.    Easy to handle and straightforward to install.   Prevents snow/tile slippage.   2m wide x 162mm high.   Brackets should be fitted at a maximum of 800mm centres, using two No.2 12 x 1" round head screws.  Galvanised - for long lasting performance.   Protects conservatories from falling roof tiles.   Assists in reducing insurance costs/claims caused by snow/tile damage.

product.name: 100mm Steel 90dg Gutter Angle External
product.description: Lindabs 100mm Steel 90 degree External Gutter Angle is used to connect two lengths of gutter at a 90 degree corner. Click here to view the Internal 90 degree Corner. The Angle features a rolled decorative feature on one edge, making it non reversible. Order in a choice of 8 polyester coated colours.  For small component orders that do not include lengths. Please call our sales team on 01354 700853 to discuss delivery charge options.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500.  Please note: All orders between 0-1000 + vat containing 3mtr lengths of gutter or downpipe, will incur a 75.00 +VAT (90.00 inc vat) delivery charge.  All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

Please call our sales team on 01354 700853 to discuss delivery charge options.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500. All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk. product.name: Steel 125mm Straight Overflow Protector
product.description: The 125mm Straight Overflow Protector is used to reduce the overflow within the the Lindab Half Round Gutter. The Straight Overflow Protector simply hooks over the edge of the gutter to secure. This can be fitted during the installation or at a later date.  For small component orders that do not include lengths. Please call our sales team on 01354 700853 to discuss delivery charge options.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500.  Please note: All orders between 0-1000 + vat containing 3mtr lengths of gutter or downpipe, will incur a 75.00 +VAT (90.00 inc vat) delivery charge.  All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

Lindab SOKN75  Please Note: All Lindab Products are currently carrying a lead time of 5-7 days  For small component orders that do not include lengths. Please call our sales team on 01354 700853 to discuss delivery charge options.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500. All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

product.name: 68mm Downpipe Leaf Guard
product.description: The Downpipe Leaf Guard is for use with the Marley 68mm Round Downpipe. The Leaf Guard prevents leaves from entering and blocking the downpipe. The Guard sits inside the Downpipe, making colour irrelevant. However it can be ordered in Black, Grey, White, Brown and Anthracite Grey.    Next day delivery.  Limited stock available,to check availabiltyplease contact us on 01354 700853.

product.name: Clipmaster 112mm Half Round Gutter Angle 45deg
product.description: The 112mm Clipmaster Half Round 45 degree Angle can be used to change the direction of any gutter, not just Marley Clipmaster. product.name: 68mm Downpipe Shoe
product.description: Marleys 68mm Downpipe Shoe is suitable for the 68mm round Downpipe system. The Downpipe Shoe sits at the bottom of the downpipe and steers the rainwater away from the building. Limited stock available,to check availabiltyplease contact us on 01354 700853.

product.name: 110mm Double Socket Soil Pipe Coupler
product.description: Drainage Online stock the full range of Brett Martin 110mm soil pipe products, including this Double Socket Soil Pipe Coupler. product.name: 32mm Push-Fit Socket Plug
product.description: The Brett Martin 32mm Push Fit Waste Pipe Socket Plug is manufactured to kitemark BS EN 1451 using durable polypropylene which possesses semi-crystalline properties, performing well under chemical resistance and structural application compared to amorphous thermoplastics.
